name: CodePetPal XP Prototype
description: A mock-data experiment for XP, streaks, encouragement loops, and lightweight progress feedback around CodePet-style learning.

name: Gradex Dashboard Prototype
description: A teacher dashboard sketch for grade signals, class summaries, and clearer progress views without touching production data.

name: TapCheck Attendance Experiments
description: Attendance interaction prototypes using mock rosters, quick check-in states, and classroom-friendly review screens.

name: Pika Polling Playground
description: A playground for classroom polls, quick pulse checks, and low-friction feedback moments that could orbit the Pika ecosystem.
